text:
Created attachment 160744
cinnamon crash log

Enviroment:
amd64 10.2

Description:
After a long compile on my machine. Cinnamon doesn't start at all. When asked to go in fallback mode. Only a blackscreen is shown, or the user asked to restart cinnamon in a loop if no is selected. This happens everytime gnome/deps are updated. I have attached a log of the errors.
